description: Faces is an AI presentation tool for creating, editing, publishing, and sharing interactive web-based slide decks. It supports direct use in the web app as well as programmatic deck and slide management.
summary: faces.app exposes a REST API at `https://faces.app/api/v1` with an OpenAPI spec, an OAuth-protected streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.faces.app/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `faces` CLI.
